resources.string: Notifications to remind you to stay hydrated
We\'ll personalize the app for you.
Choose the option that best describes you.
Pick your general daily activity level.
Tell us your wake and sleep times.
Add your name and a profile photo to personalize your experience.
Tap the button to start hydrating!
Let\'s set up your personalized water intake goal based on your lifestyle and preferences.
Based on scientific research and your profile
Gentle nudges during your active hours
Use your camera to take a new photo
Your goal considers your profile and schedule. These factors influence total intake and notification cadence.
Your personalized hydration plan is ready.
Are you sure you want to delete \"%1$s\"? This action cannot be undone.
100%% counts the full amount toward your goal
Icon updates automatically based on volume
Water goal calculation and Health Connect
True black backgrounds in dark mode
Hide the bar when scrolling down
Change reminder mode or set a custom interval
Reminders are spaced automatically based on your daily goal and active hours.
Reminders are sent at your chosen fixed interval between wake-up and sleep.
Your day ends at sleep time. Daily progress resets then.
Your day ends at midnight, matching the calendar day.
Based on your %1$s goal, you\'ll get about %2$d reminders (one per glass) spread across your %3$d active hours. Roughly every %4$d minutes.
You\'ll receive a reminder %1$s between %2$s and %3$s.
Quick-select containers on the home screen. Tap to edit, drag to reorder.
Beverages offered in quick add. Drag to reorder, drag into Hidden to hide.
This will remove all custom containers and restore the default presets. This action cannot be undone.
Beverages offered in quick add. Tap to edit, drag to reorder.
This restores the default beverage order, unhides all presets, and removes all custom beverages. This action cannot be undone.
Share hydration data with other health apps
Import your past HydroTracker entries from Health Connect. Choose a time range:
No water intake entries found in the database.
Your body is building its foundation - keep it hydrated!
Hydration is your energy source - fuel your busy life!
Stay refreshed and vibrant with proper hydration!
Hydration supports your wellness journey every day!
Very heavy exercise or physical job
Even at rest, your body needs consistent hydration!
Light activity still means you need extra hydration support!
Regular exercise requires regular hydration - you\'re doing great!
Your active lifestyle deserves premium hydration care!
High performance demands high hydration - you\'re a champion!
Indie Android developer focused on clean, privacy-respecting apps.
No app found to open this link
HydroTracker is built and maintained by one person, with no ads and no tracking. If it has helped you drink more water, anything you chip in keeps it growing.
Leave a rating on the Play Store
Look for updates about once a day
Open the F-Droid app to update HydroTracker.
A new version is available on Google Play
Open Google Play to update HydroTracker.
Open the F-Droid app to update HydroTracker.
Download the latest APK from GitHub.
Health Connect is not available on this device
Health Connect app needs to be updated
Permissions not granted for Health Connect
Are you sure you want to delete this %1$s %2$s entry?
This entry was imported from another health app and cannot be edited. You can only view its details.
🎉 Amazing! You\'ve reached your daily goal!
🌟 Halfway there! Keep up the good work!
Set your daily water intake goal. This will be used to track your progress and calculate reminders.
Your activity level affects your daily water needs. Changing this will automatically update your daily goal.
Set your daily schedule to get reminders only during your active hours. This will automatically adjust your reminder frequency.
Gender helps us calculate more accurate hydration recommendations based on physiological differences.
Age affects your daily water needs. Different age groups have varying hydration requirements.
Adding your weight helps us provide more accurate hydration recommendations. This information is optional and stored locally.
Please enter a valid weight (30–300 kg)
Leave empty if you prefer not to share
of days you met your goal
Start tracking your water intake to see your goal achievement rate!
No data available for this week
No data available for the last 30 days
No data available for this year

string-array.name: notification_gentle_titles
string-array.item: Gentle Hydration Reminder
Time for Some Water
Your Body is Calling
Gentle Hydration Break
Soft Reminder from HydroTracker
A Moment for Hydration
Water Wellness Check

string-array.name: notification_gentle_messages_low
string-array.item: Your body would love some refreshing water right now.
How about a sip of something refreshing?
A gentle reminder to nurture yourself with water.
Time to give your body the hydration it deserves.
Let\'s start building that healthy hydration habit.
Starting your day with water sets a healthy tone.
A small glass now can make a big difference later.
Your cells are asking for a little attention.

string-array.name: notification_gentle_messages_mid
string-array.item: You\'re making great progress! Keep it flowing.
Halfway there! Your body appreciates every drop.
Looking good! Time for another refreshing moment.
Your hydration journey is flowing beautifully.
Keep up the wonderful work! Another sip awaits.
You\'re building a great rhythm today.
Steady progress is the best kind of progress.
Every sip is a step toward your goal.

string-array.name: notification_gentle_messages_high
string-array.item: Almost there! You\'re doing wonderfully.
Your dedication to hydration is inspiring.
So close to your goal! Keep flowing forward.
Your body is thanking you for this care.
Beautiful progress! Just a bit more to go.
Your consistency is paying off.
You have come so far — don\'t stop now.
The finish line is closer than you think.

string-array.name: notification_gentle_messages_final
string-array.item: You\'re so close to achieving your daily goal!
Final stretch! Your consistency is amazing.
Almost at the finish line! You\'ve got this.
Your dedication today has been incredible.
One more push to complete your hydration victory.
Just a little more to reach your goal.
You should be proud of today\'s effort.
Victory is just a few sips away.

string-array.name: notification_motivating_titles
string-array.item: Hydration Champion!
Water Warrior Alert!
Power Up with H2O!
Hydration Hero Time!
Fuel Your Success!
Time to Level Up!
Champion Mode: Activated

string-array.name: notification_motivating_messages_low
string-array.item: Time to CRUSH your hydration goals! Let\'s GO!
Your SUCCESS starts with the next sip!
Champions hydrate! Are you ready to DOMINATE?
FUEL your potential with premium H2O!
Winners stay hydrated! Time to LEVEL UP!
First step to victory — grab some water!
Every champion starts with the basics. Hydrate!
Your competition is hydrating. Are you?

string-array.name: notification_motivating_messages_mid
string-array.item: UNSTOPPABLE! You\'re building momentum!
CRUSHING IT! Halfway to hydration victory!
POWERFUL progress! Keep that energy flowing!
AMAZING work! You\'re on fire today!
CHAMPION mindset! Push forward!
Momentum is building, keep it going!
You are stronger than your excuses. Drink up!
No limits, no excuses. Just hydration.

string-array.name: notification_motivating_messages_high
string-array.item: INCREDIBLE dedication! Victory is within reach!
OUTSTANDING! You\'re in the winner\'s zone!
PHENOMENAL! Final quarter — you\'ve got this!
EXCELLENCE in action! Keep dominating!
LEGENDARY persistence! Almost at the summit!
The finish line is in sight!
Leave it all on the field. Hydrate!
Greatness is earned one sip at a time.

string-array.name: notification_motivating_messages_final
string-array.item: FINAL PUSH! Greatness awaits!
SO CLOSE to TOTAL VICTORY!
MAXIMUM effort for MAXIMUM results!
ULTIMATE hydration hero! Finish strong!
LEGENDARY status incoming! Complete the mission!
Close it out strong, champion!
This is what separates good from great. Finish!
One last push. You were born for this.

string-array.name: notification_minimal_titles
string-array.item: Water reminder

string-array.name: notification_facts
string-array.item: Your brain is 75% water — feed it well!
Water helps regulate your body temperature.
Proper hydration can improve your mood and concentration.
Your muscles are 75% water.
Water helps transport nutrients throughout your body.
Staying hydrated can boost your energy levels.
Water helps your kidneys filter waste efficiently.
Proper hydration supports healthy skin.
Your blood is 90% water.
Water helps lubricate your joints.
Hydration can improve your physical performance.
Water aids in digestion and nutrient absorption.
Staying hydrated helps maintain healthy blood pressure.
Water helps prevent kidney stones.
Your heart works more efficiently when you\'re hydrated.
Dehydration can cause headaches and fatigue.
Drinking water before meals can help with portion control.
Water is essential for maintaining body temperature during exercise.
Even mild dehydration can impair cognitive function.
Water makes up about 60% of your total body weight.

string-array.name: notification_puns
string-array.item: Water you waiting for? Let\'s hydrate!
Don\'t let your hydration goals go down the drain!
H2-Oh yeah! Time for water!
You\'re one in a mill-ion! Stay hydrated!
Water wonderful day to stay hydrated!
Sea what happens when you drink more water!
Don\'t be a drip — drink up!
Water pressure? We prefer hydration pleasure!
Make waves with your hydration game!
Pool your energy and drink some water!
Current mood: Needs more water!
Tide yourself over with some H2O!
Water good choice to stay hydrated!
Flow with the hydration rhythm!
Sink or swim — we choose hydrate!
Stay hydrated and keep your spirits afloat.
Life is better when you\'re well-hydrated.
Keep calm and drink water.
Hydration is the best medication.
A glass a day keeps the fatigue away.
